title: Boot/Kernel Configuration Modified
expression: contains(event.category, 'file') && contains(event.type, 'change') && (contains(file.path || '', '/etc/sysctl') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modules-load.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/modprobe.d/') || contains(file.path || '', '/etc/default/grub') || contains(file.path || '', '/lib/modules/'))
